description: File system operations with path traversal protection

create_file.name: Create File
create_file.description: Create a new file with optional content

read_file.name: Read File
read_file.description: Read the content of a file as string or lines

write_file.name: Write File
write_file.description: Write content to a file, optionally appending

copy_file.name: Copy File
copy_file.description: Copy a file to a new location

move_file.name: Move File
move_file.description: Move a file to a new location

path_exists.name: Path Exists
path_exists.description: Check if a file or directory path exists

get_file_info.name: Get File Info
get_file_info.description: Get detailed information about a file

list_files.name: List Files
list_files.description: List files in a directory with optional pattern matching

combine_paths.name: Combine Paths
combine_paths.description: Combine multiple path segments into a single path

get_absolute_path.name: Get Absolute Path
get_absolute_path.description: Convert a relative path to an absolute path

rename_file.name: Rename File
rename_file.description: Rename a file in the same directory

get_path_part.name: Get Path Part
get_path_part.description: Extract a specific part from a file path (name, stem, extension, parent)
